subtasks.description: Query license data grouped by publisher. Compute total contract value, average cost per seat, and count of licenses for each publisher. Return publisher name with aggregated metrics.

plan.cost_rationale: This is a straightforward aggregation query on a single table with GROUP BY, SUM, AVG, and COUNT functions. No joins, CTEs, or complex window functions required. A small-tier model can reliably generate this SQL. The query produces one result set with all requested metrics, so only one sql_gen subtask is needed. No cross-source reconciliation or policy evaluation required."

output.sql: SELECT publisher, SUM(amount_usd) AS total_contract_value, AVG(amount_usd / NULLIF(daily_active_seats, 0)) AS avg_cost_per_seat, COUNT(*) AS license_count FROM consumption_facts GROUP BY publisher
